originalAlarm.description: The value written to `&flags` is never used.

presenceCondition: (and (= CROSS_COMPILE true) (= WIN32 false) (= NEED_ENHANCED_ESCAPES true))
model:
(define-fun WIN32 () Bool
  false)
(define-fun NEED_ENHANCED_ESCAPES () Bool
  true)
(define-fun CROSS_COMPILE () Bool
  true)
reasoning: When CROSS_COMPILE=T, the code takes the #if CROSS_COMPILE branch (L6-7), and the #elif defined(WIN32) || defined(OS2) block at L10-12 is never reached. Therefore NEED_ENHANCED_ESCAPES is never defined when CROSS_COMPILE=T. The PC {CROSS_COMPILE=T, NEED_ENHANCED_ESCAPES=T} is contradictory — NEED_ENHANCED_ESCAPES cannot be T when CROSS_COMPILE=T. Infeasible configuration.
